_comment: Migration rules for OpenHands config.toml. Each entry describes a key rename or transform from a prior version to v1.0.

migrations.description: Renamed in OpenHands 0.9+ — base_url is the current key name
Renamed in OpenHands 1.0+ — runtime_container_image is the current key name
Renamed in OpenHands 1.x — max_iterations is the current key name
Legacy alias openai_base_url replaced by base_url in OpenHands 0.9+
use_docker replaced by use_host_network; semantic is inverted — review manually
